MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANTHONY CHICOTEL OF CANHR, TEL. NO. 974-5171 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. SCOTT J. KIEPEN OF HOOPER LUNDY & BOOKMAN, TEL. NO. 875-8510 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT KINDRED HEALTHCARE OPERATING, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Granted with ten days leave to amend.
